description: A vertical White House statistics card on a dark navy background. A large serif white headline at top reads 'Economy', underlined by a horizontal rule. Behind the text is a darkened photo of Trump (right side, in a suit) speaking at a podium with blue 'LOWER PRICES, BIGGER PAYCHECKS FOR NORTH CAROLINA' signage and a decorated tree. A bulleted list runs down the card in white sans-serif, with several phrases in yellow: 'The U.S. economy added 37k private sector jobs.'; 'The Atlanta Fed doubled its Q4 2025 GDP estimate from 2.7% to 5.4%.'; 'President Trump reached a deal with drugmaker Johnson & Johnson to lower drug prices.'; 'President Trump directed Congress to purchase $200 billion in mortgage bonds in order to reduce mortgage rates.'; 'President Trump announced he is taking steps to ban large institutional investors from purchasing single-family homes.'; 'The U.S. trade deficit fell 39% to $29.4 billion - its lowest level since 2009.'; 'The S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average hit record high closes.' A small White House building emblem sits centered at the bottom.
notable_text: Economy; The U.S. economy added 37k private sector jobs; Atlanta Fed doubled its Q4 2025 GDP estimate from 2.7% to 5.4%; trade deficit fell 39% to $29.4 billion - its lowest level since 2009; S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average hit record high closes
